title: A new metabarcoding approach to survey diversity at the species level of Arcellinida (Amoebozoa: Tubulinea)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"abpnf","text":"PCR protocol for the paper:\" A needle in a haystack: a new metabarcoding approach to survey diversity at the species level of Arcellinida (Amoebozoa: Tubulinea)\" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: First PCR Primers: Primer forward: LCO 1490 (5´ GGTCAACAAATCATAAAGATATTGG 3´) Primer reverse: HCO 2198 (5´ TAAACTTCAGGGTGACCAAAAAATCA 3´) Reagents for the PCR : A B 1 Polymerase 6 μL 2 BSA 1 μL 3 Primer forward 1 μL (10 μmol) 4 Primer reverse 1 μL (10 μmol) 5 Destilated water 1 μL 6 Sample (eDNA) 1 μL Total reaction mix per sample= 10 μL Thermocycler program: A B C D 1 Temperature Time cycles 2 Initial denaturation 96 °C 5 min 1 3 Denaturation 94 °C 15 s 40 4 Annealing 40 °C 15 s 5 Extension 72 °C 90 s 6 Final extension 72 °C 10 min 1 Denaturation temperatures and times may vary depending on the polymerase used. This protocol was tested with the MyTaq™ Red Mix™ polymerase. Gel electrophoresis: Analyze the results of your PCR reaction via gel electrophoresis. The resultant fragment was 692 bp long: example of four PCR products with one negative control on the right. HyperLadder™ 1kb as the molecular weight marker.

Second PCR Primers: Primer forward: LCO 1490 (5´ GGTCAACAAATCATAAAGATATTGG 3´) Primer reverse: ArCOIR (5´ CCACYNGAATGWGCTARAATACC 3´) Reagents for the PCR : A B 1 Polymerase 12 μL 2 Primer forward 1 μL (10 μmol) 3 Primer reverse 1 μL (10 μmol) 4 Destilated water 6 μL 5 Sample (first PCR product) 1 μL Total reaction mix per sample= 20 μL Thermocycler program: A B C D 1 Temperature Time cycles 2 Initial denaturation 96 °C 5 min 1 3 Denaturation 94 °C 15 s 40 4 Annealing 55 °C 15 s 5 Extension 72 °C 90 s 6 Final extension 72 °C 10 min 1 Denaturation temperatures and times may vary depending on the polymerase used. This protocol was tested with the MyTaq™ Red Mix™ polymerase. Gel electrophoresis: Analyze the results of your PCR reaction via gel electrophoresis. The resultant fragment was 407 bp long
creator: R. González-Miguéns
